history.title: Meeting history
history.description: Meeting history from the backend with project context and review status.
history.emptyFiltered: No meetings match the current filters. Clear or widen the filters and try again.
history.emptyDefault: No meetings yet. The first extension recording will appear here.
history.retryExtraction: Extraction must be retried before approval.

activeSession.emptyDescription: Open the extension in Google Meet to start recording.
activeSession.recordingDescription: The extension is streaming Google Meet audio into the backend pipeline.
activeSession.processingDescription: Recording has stopped and the backend is finishing the meeting artifacts.

overview.workflowDescription: Review-first layout. This header keeps only the minimum meeting context visible.
overview.editCardDescription: Update the meeting title, reference id, and attached project without leaving the review workspace.
overview.editDialogDescription: Refine the meeting's operational identity before the review is locked and the workflow moves into memory or Notion sync.
overview.projectAssignmentHint: You can move the meeting to another project until the review is approved or a synced task exists.
overview.projectAssignmentLocked: Project reassignment is locked after approval or once any task has synced to Notion.
overview.projectOptionsEmpty: No projects are available for reassignment yet.
overview.metadataSaveError: Unable to update the meeting metadata.

workflow.statusDescription: Kapter review follows this sequence. Keep it visible above the editing workspace as the operating guideline.
workflow.guideDescription: Kapter follows a fixed review sequence before memory updates and external sync can run.

extracting.title: Extraction
extracting.description: Wait for capture, transcript batches, and chunked artifact extraction.

review.title: Review
review.description: Edit the summary and tasks before locking the meeting record.

project-memory.title: Project memory
project-memory.description: Accept or dismiss the proposed context update for future meetings.

notion-sync.title: Notion sync
notion-sync.description: Manually sync approved tasks once the project destination is ready.

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: The approved meeting has no pending memory or sync work left.

notionSync.title: Notion sync
notionSync.description: Sync stays manual. Kapter creates Notion tasks only after review approval and project setup are complete.
notionSync.syncResult: Synced {{synced}} task(s) and skipped {{skipped}} already synced task(s).
notionSync.destinationCreated: Kapter created the project destination automatically during this run.
notionSync.approveBeforeSync: Approve the meeting before syncing any tasks to Notion.
notionSync.resolveProposalBeforeSync: Resolve the project-memory proposal first. Sync becomes available after you apply it or dismiss it.
notionSync.connectPrompt: Connect Notion now. Sync stays locked until the meeting is approved and the project setup is ready.
notionSync.missingDestinationNotice: This project does not have a Notion destination yet. Configure it on the dashboard before syncing tasks.
notionSync.autoCreateDestinationNotice: This project does not have a Notion destination yet. Kapter will create the project page and Action Items database automatically during sync.
notionSync.connectError: Unable to connect the Notion workspace.
notionSync.emptyTaskQueue: No approved action items are available for Notion sync yet.
notionSync.syncDisabledNotice: . Sync stays disabled until the meeting is approved, Notion is connected, and project-memory work is resolved.

projectMemory.title: Project memory
projectMemory.description: Promote extracted context into the project profile only when the new information will help future meetings.
projectMemory.projectDescription: Context updates from this meeting will be applied to the current project record after review.
projectMemory.noProposal: No pending memory proposal for this meeting.

speakerRoster.title: Speaker roster
speakerRoster.description: AI speaker labels discovered for this meeting so far.
speakerRoster.empty: No speaker profiles have been created yet.

reviewPanel.title: Review workspace
reviewPanel.description: The summary stays on the left, action items on the right, and both remain editable without a long vertical scroll.
reviewPanel.pendingNotice: Extraction is still running in the background. This workspace will refresh automatically while chunks complete.
reviewPanel.approvedPrefix: Approved for project memory and Notion sync
reviewPanel.summaryDescription: Keep the narrative concise and decision-ready.
reviewPanel.summaryPlaceholder: Extraction has not produced a summary yet.
reviewPanel.actionItemsDescription: Follow-ups stay beside the summary, not below it.
reviewPanel.emptyTasks: No action items yet. Add one manually if the transcript contains a concrete follow-up.

transcript.title: Transcript reference
transcript.descriptionLive: Use this when you need evidence for a review decision or task edit. The snapshot updates live as source batches finish.
transcript.descriptionStatic: Use this when you need evidence for a review decision or task edit. The snapshot is stable for manual provenance review.
transcript.emptyLive: The meeting is still being processed. Transcript turns will appear here as batches complete.
transcript.emptyStatic: No transcript has been persisted for this meeting yet.

detailExperience.deleteDialogDescription: This permanently removes the meeting record and everything derived from it.
detailExperience.deleteMeetingHint: This will permanently delete the meeting, transcript fragments, extracted tasks, and project-memory proposals attached to {{project}}. This action cannot be undone.
detailExperience.deleteMeetingError: Unable to delete the requested meeting.
detailExperience.transcriptDescription: Keep the transcript last. Use it only when you need evidence for a summary or task decision.
detailExperience.loadingDescription: Kapter is preparing the meeting review workspace, loading the merged speaker transcript, and warming the approval panels so you can start reviewing as soon as the snapshot is ready.
loadingSteps: Lock the latest meeting snapshot and verify access
Merge transcript fragments into readable speaker turns for evidence
Initialize the review, project memory, and Notion sync panels
detailExperience.unavailableDescription: The requested meeting detail could not be loaded.
detailExperience.unavailableFallback: The meeting may not exist or may not belong to the current user.
